title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: Five production-ready patterns for deploying AI agents in TypeScript: streaming tool call events for responsive UIs, layered authentication combining OAuth and IAM, type-safe database access with tenant isolation, cost and safety guardrails with model routing, and distributed observability via metrics and tracing. These practices address latency, security, data isolation, cost control, and debugging across the agent lifecycle.
